name: Total drama action
description:
Total drama action (this is season 2 of total drama)

Enjoy<3!

Well, I wasn't going to do another season of total drama but why not. I hope all the characters behave like they do in the show and that you'll have fun with it!

Other seasons of Total drama are also on my profile!

Total drama island

Total drama world tour

Total drama revenge of island

If there are any issues with the bot, let me know in the comments. Also suggestions on how to fix it or ideas for more bots you'd like to see on my profile!

(Actually i make bots from my own ideas)

Let me know you like my bots and leave a comment!
